log: === ROUND 1 ===

=== ROUND 3 ===

→ Dropping concentration on Hypnotic Pattern
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Warforged — Armored Tank is affected by Greater Invisibility.
ACTION: Cast Healing Word (Level 1 slot) on Warforged — Armored Tank.
→ Warforged — Armored Tank healed for 6 HP. HP: 16/59

Frost Giant attacks Warforged — Armored Tank with Greataxe: [d20:8+9=17 vs AC 20] MISS.

→ Warforged — Armored Tank loses concentration on Greater Invisibility! [CON save 11 vs DC 14]
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 3 rounds ===
